scenes.title: WonderFood
scenes.subtitle: Local-first food planning for Android.
scenes.narration: Meet WonderFood. A local-first food workspace for pantry, recipes, meals, shopping, receipts, and nutrition.

scenes.title: One daily food workspace
scenes.narration: Plan the day from one Android screen.

scenes.title: Inventory that remembers context
scenes.narration: Keep inventory useful with lots, expiry, prices, notes, and nutrition confidence.

scenes.title: Shopping and receipts become drafts
scenes.narration: Turn shopping and receipts into reviewable changes.

scenes.title: AI proposes. You decide.

scenes.narration: AI can propose. The app validates. You decide what gets saved.
